betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Fear. 
Fear of death.
Fear of irrelevance.
Fear of unworthiness.
Fear of inconsequentiality.
No matter when, where, how, or who; these fears exist in all who are living.
Because life, even for the Ascended, even for the so called 'Infinite', is something that ends.
And that realization comes, to everyone, sooner or later.
The answer, the reaction, can only be of two types.
Acceptance, or denial.
Denial is made easy for the powerful. Barriers can be put in place. Contingency plans. Inherited will. Secrets of the heart.
And yet, the fact eventually makes itself clear.
All the plans, all the eventualities, shattered.
And, as life fades, the truth unbears itself.
No, you do not have control. All your plans, they mean nothing.
And that is ok.
That is life.
And life, in its limits, in its messiness, in its uncontrollability, is beautiful.
Because it is limited.
Because it is messy.
Because it is uncontrollable.
Every moment, it is given, not taken.
And because it is given, it is precious.
